description: A customer who upgraded their plan mid-cycle is asking why their latest bill is higher than expected.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the correct bill.

nodes.task_description: Identify the prorated charges for the plan upgrade.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the line items corresponding to the proration.

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain how prorated charges are calculated and that their next bill will be for the normal, expected amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully educates the customer about prorated billing.
